title: orchis × bergonii
intro: Orchis × bergonii is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between the Orchis mascula and the Ophrys sphegodes species. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Orchis × bergonii involve drying and processing the plant parts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions.
